collection.name: Students_(vw_cmj_cat_group)
collection.prototype: Select id, created_date, updated_date, Module, self_1, self_2, self_3, nameFull, birthDate, startDate, group_st, course, speciality from ( select rkkbase.id, rkkbase.created_date, rkkbase.updated_date, rkkbase.module as module, '<id>' as self_1, ':' as self_2, '</>' as self_3, ( select tfs."value" as v from tn_field join tn_field_string tfs on tn_field.access_object_id = tfs.id where tn_field."owner" = rkkbase.id and tn_field.owner_type = rkkbase.id_type and tn_field.cmjfield = 'nameFull') as nameFull, date((select tfs."value" as v from tn_field join tn_field_dateonly tfs on tn_field.access_object_id = tfs.id where tn_field."owner" = rkkbase.id and tn_field.owner_type = rkkbase.id_type and tn_field.cmjfield = 'birthDate')) as birthDate, date((select tfs."value" as v from tn_field join tn_field_dateonly tfs on tn_field.access_object_id = tfs.id where tn_field."owner" = rkkbase.id and tn_field.owner_type = rkkbase.id_type and tn_field.cmjfield = 'startDate')) as startDate, (select coalesce(tfs."value", '<Не указано>') as v from tn_field join tn_field_string tfs on tn_field.access_object_id = tfs.id where tn_field."owner" = rkkbase.id and tn_field.owner_type = rkkbase.id_type and tn_field.cmjfield = 'group') as group_st, (select tfs."value" as v from tn_field join tn_field_string tfs on tn_field.access_object_id = tfs.id where tn_field."owner" = rkkbase.id and tn_field.owner_type = rkkbase.id_type and tn_field.cmjfield = 'course') as course, (select tfs."value" as v from tn_field join tn_field_string tfs on tn_field.access_object_id = tfs.id where tn_field."owner" = rkkbase.id and tn_field.owner_type = rkkbase.id_type and tn_field.cmjfield = 'speciality') as speciality from F_DP_Intrkk internalrkk join f_dp_rkk rkk on rkk.id = internalrkk.id join f_dp_rkkbase rkkbase on rkkbase.id = rkk.id where rkkbase.isdeleted <> 1) s where 1=1 ::where-clause
collection.counting-prototype: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM ( select rkkbase.id, rkkbase.created_date, rkkbase.updated_date, rkkbase.module as module, '<id>' as self_1, ':' as self_2, '</>' as self_3, ( select tfs."value" as v from tn_field join tn_field_string tfs on tn_field.access_object_id = tfs.id where tn_field."owner" = rkkbase.id and tn_field.owner_type = rkkbase.id_type and tn_field.cmjfield = 'nameFull') as nameFull, (select tfs."value" as v from tn_field join tn_field_dateonly tfs on tn_field.access_object_id = tfs.id where tn_field."owner" = rkkbase.id and tn_field.owner_type = rkkbase.id_type and tn_field.cmjfield = 'birthDate') as birthDate, (select tfs."value" as v from tn_field join tn_field_dateonly tfs on tn_field.access_object_id = tfs.id where tn_field."owner" = rkkbase.id and tn_field.owner_type = rkkbase.id_type and tn_field.cmjfield = 'startDate') as startDate, (select coalesce(tfs."value", '<Не указано>') as v from tn_field join tn_field_string tfs on tn_field.access_object_id = tfs.id where tn_field."owner" = rkkbase.id and tn_field.owner_type = rkkbase.id_type and tn_field.cmjfield = 'group') as group_st, (select tfs."value" as v from tn_field join tn_field_string tfs on tn_field.access_object_id = tfs.id where tn_field."owner" = rkkbase.id and tn_field.owner_type = rkkbase.id_type and tn_field.cmjfield = 'course') as course, (select tfs."value" as v from tn_field join tn_field_string tfs on tn_field.access_object_id = tfs.id where tn_field."owner" = rkkbase.id and tn_field.owner_type = rkkbase.id_type and tn_field.cmjfield = 'speciality') as speciality from F_DP_Intrkk internalrkk join f_dp_rkk rkk on rkk.id = internalrkk.id join f_dp_rkkbase rkkbase on rkkbase.id = rkk.id where rkkbase.isdeleted <> 1) s where 1=1 ::where-clause

filter.name: created_date
filter.criteria: cast(created_date as date) = cast({0} as date)
